com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class StoredJobInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StoredJobInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    public class StoredJobInfo
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    StoredJobInfo class provide path to get information regarding jobs stored in a printer. This class can retrieve information like:-

    • Stored Job Id
    • Stored Job Name
    • Stored Job FolderName
    • Stored Job UserName
    • Store Job Timestamp
    • Stored Job PasswordType
    • Color Mode
    • Original MediaSize
    • Output Sides
    • Total Pages

    Since:
    API 3

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CopyAttributes.ColorMode getColorMode()
      Retrieve color mode of stored job from the printer.
      int getCopies()
      Retrieve number of copies required for each stored job.
      CopyAttributes.ScanSize getOriginalMediaSize()
      Retrieve original media size of stored job from the printer.
      CopyAttributes.Duplex getOutputSides()
      Retrieve output sides of stored job from the printer.
      java.lang.String getStoredJobFolderName()
      Retrieve stored job folder name from the printer.
      java.lang.String getStoredJobId()
      Retrieve stored job id from the printer.
      java.lang.String getStoredJobName()
      Retrieve stored job name from the printer.
      JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType getStoredJobPasswordType()
      Retrieve password type of stored job from the printer.
      java.lang.String getStoredJobUserName()
      Retrieve username which is used while creating a stored job.
      java.lang.String getStoreJobTimestamp()
      Retrieve timestamp of stored job from the printer.
      int getTotalPages()
      Retrieve total number of pages of stored job.

    • Method Detail

      • getStoredJobId

        public java.lang.String getStoredJobId()

        Retrieve stored job id from the printer.

        Returns:

        Stored job id.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null since it is required to identify job.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobFolderName

        public java.lang.String getStoredJobFolderName()

        Retrieve stored job folder name from the printer.

        Returns:

        Stored job folder name.

        • Return value can be empty and if no value is assigned, the function will return empty string.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobName

        public java.lang.String getStoredJobName()

        Retrieve stored job name from the printer.

        Returns:

        Stored job name.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and if no name is set for the job, then job is assigned with a default name.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobUserName

        public java.lang.String getStoredJobUserName()

        Retrieve username which is used while creating a stored job.

        Returns:

        Username of stored job.

        • Return value can be empty or null and if value is set empty, then getStoredJobUserName will return empty string.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobPasswordType

        public JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType getStoredJobPasswordType()

        Retrieve password type of stored job from the printer.

        Returns:

        Password type of stored job.

        • Return value can't be empty or null and it should be either any of the values from JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoreJobTimestamp

        public java.lang.String getStoreJobTimestamp()

        Retrieve timestamp of stored job from the printer.

        Returns:

        timestamp of stored job.

        • Return value can't be empty or null and the timestamp value is auto assigned when the job is stored.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCopies

        public int getCopies()

        Retrieve number of copies required for each stored job.

        Returns:

        Number of copies required.

        • Return value ranges from [1 to 9999].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getColorMode

        public CopyAttributes.ColorMode getColorMode()

        Retrieve color mode of stored job from the printer.

        Returns:

        ColorMode of the stored job.

        • Return value can't be empty or null and it should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.ColorMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getOriginalMediaSize

        public CopyAttributes.ScanSize getOriginalMediaSize()

        Retrieve original media size of stored job from the printer.

        Returns:

        Original media size of the stored job.

        • Return value can't be empty or null and it should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getOutputSides

        public CopyAttributes.Duplex getOutputSides()

        Retrieve output sides of stored job from the printer.

        Returns:

        Output sides of the stored job.

        • Return value can't be empty or null and it should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getTotalPages

        public int getTotalPages()

        Retrieve total number of pages of stored job.

        Returns:

        Number of total pages.

        • Return value should not be less than 1.

        Since:
        API 3
